message:
feat(pack-info): show patterns by default, add --json and --no-patterns flags

- Switch aarch64 Linux target from gnu to musl for static linking (bd-3w60)
- Update install.sh to use musl target for aarch64
- Add static link verification step in dist.yml for musl builds
- Enhance `dcg pack info` to show patterns by default with --no-patterns opt-out
- Add --json output for machine-readable pack info
- Display severity, reason, explanation, and suggestions for destructive patterns
- Close beads bd-1yyf and bd-3w60

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -35,9 +35,9 @@ jobs:
           - os: ubuntu-latest
             target: x86_64-unknown-linux-musl
             artifact_name: dcg
-          # Linux ARM64 (native build on ARM64 runner)
+          # Linux ARM64 (musl for static linking / portable binaries)
           - os: ubuntu-24.04-arm
-            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu
+            target: aarch64-unknown-linux-musl
             artifact_name: dcg
           # macOS Intel
           - os: macos-15-intel
@@ -71,6 +71,12 @@ jobs:
       - name: Build release binary
         run: cargo build --release --target ${{ matrix.target }}
 
+      - name: Verify static linking (Linux musl)
+        if: contains(matrix.target, 'musl')
+        run: |
+          file target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact_name }}
+          ! ldd target/${{ matrix.target }}/release/${{ matrix.artifact_name }} 2>&1 | grep -q "dynamic"
+
       - name: Create tarball (Unix)
         if: runner.os != 'Windows'
         run: |
